basics.name: LI Baichuan
basics.summary: Computer Engineering undergraduate at HKUST working on smartphone-based tour guidance systems, multimodal query routing, and mobile applications.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST), Hong Kong
courses: COMP2012 Object-Oriented Programming and Data Structures (A)
COMP2211 Exploring Artificial Intelligence with Python (A)

publications.name: AutoTour: Automatic Photo Tour Guide with Smartphones and LLMs
publications.summary: Research project on smartphone-based tour guidance systems using large language models.

research.name: AutoTour: Automatic Photo Tour Guide with Smartphones and LLMs
research.summary: Research project on smartphone-based tour guidance systems using large language models. Preprint available at arXiv:2601.06781.

research.name: MMRouter
research.summary: Research project on routing multimodal queries to improve cost-performance trade-offs in model selection.

awards.title: University's Scholarship Scheme for Continuing Undergraduate Students

service: Co-founder and Coding Team Lead, HKUST-UGAIL

portfolio.name: Nuola (挪啦)
portfolio.description: Flutter application for critical SMS detection and real-time alerting, with emphasis on dependable mobile deployment. Deployed on major Android app galleries in China; recorded over 500 active users in the first month and generated initial revenue.

portfolio.name: VocabuStory
portfolio.description: LLM-powered Flutter application for language learning through customized narrative generation and interactive content design.

portfolio.name: Agent Skills for Study Automation
portfolio.description: Designed and authored two reusable agent skills, summarize-slides and homework-solver, built around multi-agent collaboration for study support workflows. Shared publicly, receiving 6,000+ likes and saves on Xiaohongshu and 80+ GitHub stars.
